entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Service Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a question, I want to obtain the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Service Cloud certificate, where can I prepare? What should be studied? Which learning journey should I study? I want to pass, can someone help me please.

Certification

entry.title: Action needed before you can receive your SAP Certification!
entry.content:
Dears,

Currently I am facing a issue I just completed my Fiori exam but I am not able to find my certificated even though I setup my universal ID aleardy and give attemp via same email but still I am not able to fix this issue.

Pictures are attached

entry.title: Query on certification
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Please help me out on this. I am planning to schedule my SAP certification exam in mid October. While scheduling the exam I will be in India but while taking the exam I will be in another country. Will my location allow me to take exam or I need to take the exam in India only.

Kindly help.

Best Regards

entry.title: How long does it take to confirm a payment for certification?
entry.content:
I made a payment via credit card on September 27, 2024, with six attempts, and the amounts were deducted from my account. However, I did not receive any acknowledgment or order number, and the attempts are not reflected in SAP.

I have already created a ticket regarding this issue but have not received a response. What should I do now?

Merchant Name : RATIOCINATE DYNAMICS PRIVATE LIMITED is this the correct Transaction Merchant name Please confirm

entry.title: SAP universal id link to another email. no link button
entry.content: I have problem linking external email to SAP universal id. Email is verified but no link button appears.

entry.title: How can I schedule my exam????!!!
entry.content: I have been trying for weeks to now! I have cer001 . I have not been able to get full help from support . They closed my ticket and sent me to faq but when I click schedule exam it says I have no attempts! This is taking up study time. I’m so frustrated

entry.title: Trying to Pass P_SAPEA_2023 Exam
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I’m reaching out because I’m trying to get my certification for the P_SAPEA_2023 exam, but I’m feeling really overwhelmed and scared to even give it a shot. I have a few questions and would appreciate any advice or tips you might have!

  • Study Time: If you’ve taken this exam or any similar one, how long did you study for it? I want to set a realistic timeline for my preparation.

  • Background: I don’t have any prior experience with SAP or in this specific field. Do you think going through the official materials and online resources will be enough for me to grasp the concepts?

  • Recommended Resources: Are there any specific resources or study guides that you found particularly helpful for this exam?

  • ERPPrep.com: Has anyone used erpprep.com for study materials? Is it worth it and reliable for the P_SAPEA_2023 exam?

I’m open to any tips or advice you all might have, so please feel free to share anything that could help.

Thank you so much!

entry.title: CER006 exam attempts payment instructions
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

I received booking submission confirmation mail from training.global@sap.com for CER006 order, but its more than 2 days I have not received any further communications regarding payments so I can schedule my exam, Am I missing any process from my side? Can anyone help me out here? 

Regards,

Vijay Chembun

entry.title: Scoring system for SAP Activate Project Manager exam
entry.content:
Hello,

What is the scoring system for SAP Activate Project Manager exam?

For partially correct answers in multiple-choice questions, do we get penalized for incorrect choices?

Example: if there are 3 correct answers for a 5 choices question, and we select only 2 correct and 1 incorrect, is the score 2 out of 5 or otherwise?

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: CER006
entry.content:
Hi, I have studied for the C_TS4FI_2023 and have been trying to purchase CER006 or even CER001 in order to schedule my exam but no link shows up. When I go to the certification and try to book however it says to purchase learning hub. 
 
Is CER001 and CER006 not available to purchase anymore? This is inconvenient because the CER006 was perfect for me and 1340 USD for learning hub is very expensive especially after I've already spent a lot learning the material. Any help would be very appreciated.
 
Thank you, Omar

entry.title: How to get the voucher codes to get discount for certification
entry.content: How to get voucher to get discounts on certification programs

entry.title: CER0006 Submission confirmed no further update
entry.content: I am not getting any further confirmation for payment and start applying for exam. what to do? with whom to follow up?

entry.title: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I've prepared for a couple of SAP certifications and wanted to purchase CER006 subscription for 6 SAP certification attempts. Unfortunately, on training.sap.com , I get to page for CER006 but I'm unable to find the book/purchase option. CER006 - SAP Certification Exam, Six Attempts | SAP Training

I've tried multiple browsers, cleared cache etc. Just to test my ID, I tried booking a random course and there I do get option to book but just not for CER006(or CER001)

Has anyone faced similar issues. Ant help on how to go about this would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

Neha

entry.title: Re: SAP Practice
entry.content:
Dear @Muhammad_Zain 

Really appreciate your effort and confidence to have certification SAP  C_TS4FI_2023 in SAP S/4HANA Finance  . Its seems good to practice before final examination but for that you have to arrange the tenant from your side or either you have purchase from SAP Portal  - https://www.sap.com/training-certification/learning-hub.html .

Thanks
Harvind Narayan

entry.title: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certification exam for India region From SAP Training Shop
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to buy an CER001 SAP Certification Exam, One Attempt From INDIA,
but not able to purchase because the add basket option is not coming up.
This issue is coming up for India only, for other region the add basket option is visible.

Is any one know why this issue is coming?
please give if any other way to apply for certification through India region.

Thanks for reply!

entry.title: SAP certification subscription for an individual
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As an individual, I want to purchase the Learning HUB subscription. I want to schedule my exam for SAP Financial Accounting.

what is the procedure to purchase the subscription as an individual, please need your support and guidance.

Is it possible in Saudi Arabia especially, and my S-user ID is from HCL Tech.

 

Regards,
Babu.

Certification SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management

entry.title: Are there any alternatives to ERP Prep for SAP certificate training?
entry.content:
So a couple of years back I used ERP prep for getting my certification and it was extremely reliable, I would say there was only a 5% error rate in their practice answers compared to the exam.

However, I took 2 back to back different exams and failed both after scoring less than 50% correct while I was scoring 70-80% on ERP prep. (First one, I did not recognise half the questions, second one, questions were mostly the same, answers were incredibly wrong though)

So, is there any similar alternative to ERP prep which is also reliable for questions/answers?

entry.title: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I've prepared for a couple of SAP certifications and wanted to purchase CER006 subscription for 6 SAP certification attempts. Unfortunately, on training.sap.com , I get to page for CER006 but I'm unable to find the book/purchase option. CER006 - SAP Certification Exam, Six Attempts | SAP Training

I've tried multiple browsers, cleared cache etc. Just to test my ID, I tried booking a random course and there I do get option to book but just not for CER006(or CER001)

Has anyone faced similar issues. Ant help on how to go about this would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

AMRITA

entry.title: Not able to purchase one/six attempt for SAP certification exam for India region From SAP Training
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to buy an CER001 SAP Certification Exam, One Attempt , CER006 SAP Certification Exam, Six Attempt From INDIA,but not able to purchase because the add basket option is not coming up. This issue is coming up for India only, for other region the add basket option is visible.

entry.title: Exam date on confirmation email and exam dashboard different
entry.content:
Hi,

I had booked my Certification Exam for Wednesday and got an email confirmation for the same. But now when I login to Exam Dashboard, the date is mentioned as Tuesday. I am confused. Could someone please help?

 

Certification
